title: Bitcoin profit and loss ratio falls to 43-month low

title: Ebola Vaccine Trials Could Start This Year
summary: As Ebola cases rise in Congo and Uganda, vaccine developers are accelerating efforts to combat the rare Bundibugyo strain. IAVI CEO Mark Feinberg says a candidate vaccine could enter human trials by year-end. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Said It Captured Key Ukraine Stronghold in Donetsk Region
summary: Russia announced the seizure of a strategic logistics hub in the Donetsk region and claimed full control of Ukraine’s Luhansk region, days after launching its deadliest attack on Kyiv since the war began.

title: Claude Fable 5 Isn't Nerfed. The Router Is Just Paranoid

title: Senator Gillibrand Seeks to Ban Trump, Elected Officials From Launching Meme Coins
summary: After President Trump disclosed over $1 billion in crypto-related earnings, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is calling for a meme coin ban.

title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin and altcoin exchange deposits have spiked, indicating higher volatility ahead
summary: Bitcoin deposits to exchanges recently climbed to nearly 49,000 BTC, "a rare extreme" seen only four other times this year, CryptoQuant said.
